title: The Best of the Maasai Mara and Diani
description: Combine Kenya’s iconic Maasai Mara wildlife with the pristine beaches of Diani. Witness the Great Wildebeest Migration (July–October), enjoy guided game drives, and relax on Africa’s finest coastal resorts.
highlights: Witness the Great Wildebeest Migration in Maasai Mara (Jul–Oct)
Three nights in Maasai Mara at luxury lodges
Four nights in Diani Beach on the Indian Ocean
Guided game drives in open-sided Landcruisers
Return airstrip transfers and flights included

itinerary.title: Arrival and Maasai Mara Transfer
itinerary.description: Flight to Maasai Mara departing 10:00 hrs, arriving 10:50 hrs. Transfer to Ashnil Mara Lodge. Afternoon game drive at 15:30 hrs.

itinerary.title: Full Day in Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Morning and afternoon game drives in Maasai Mara. Optional full-day game drive with packed lunch. Spot the Big Five and other wildlife.

itinerary.title: Full Day in Maasai Mara
itinerary.description: Morning and afternoon game drives continue. Witness the Great Wildebeest Migration if traveling Jul–Oct.

itinerary.title: Maasai Mara to Diani Beach
itinerary.description: Early morning game drive, check-out at 10:00 hrs. Flight to Nairobi at 11:00 hrs, connect to Diani departing 14:20 hrs. Arrival at 15:30 hrs and transfer to Swahili Beach Resort & Spa.

itinerary.title: Diani Beach Leisure
itinerary.description: Relax and enjoy the beach. Optional excursions available.

itinerary.title: Diani Beach Leisure
itinerary.description: Full day at leisure or optional activities such as water sports and island tours.

itinerary.title: Diani Beach Leisure
itinerary.description: Relaxation day at Swahili Beach Resort & Spa, enjoy resort facilities.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Check out after breakfast, transfer to Diani Airport for Nairobi bound flight via Vipingo Ridge arriving 12:30 hrs. Short excursion or shopping in Nairobi if timing allows, then transfer to JKIA for onward flight.

included: Three nights accommodation in Governor camp Maasai Mara
Three nights accommodation in Diani Beach on half board (The Maji or Swahili Beach Resort & SPA) or full board (Afro Chic)
Flights: Wilson – Maasai Mara – Wilson, Wilson – Diani – Wilson on Safarilink or Governors Air
Professional driver guide and pre-tour briefing
Return airstrip transfers in Maasai Mara and Diani
Guided game drives in open-sided Landcruisers
All park entrance fees and relevant taxes
notIncluded: Personal expenses such as travel insurance, phone calls, meals/drinks not indicated
accommodation: Angama Mara Camp – Maasai Mara (3 nights)
Little Governors Camp – Maasai Mara (3 nights)
Ashnil Mara Camp – Maasai Mara (3 nights)
Swahili Beach Resort & Spa – Diani Beach (4 nights)

travelInfo.clothes: Bring mosquito repellent, sunscreen, hat, sunglasses, and malaria medication. Early mornings and evenings may be cool, so a sweater and trousers/jeans are recommended.
travelInfo.food: Most hotels and lodges serve buffet menus with desserts. Some offer set menus. Food is of international standard, prepared by professional chefs.

note: Adventures Connect LTD reserves the right to substitute accommodations with similar facilities in circumstances beyond our control.
